title: Verify Pool Assignment and exact grouped actuals
preconditions: Active, inactive, assigned, unassigned, refunded, transferred, voided, superseded, and corrected transactions across two pools and multiple categories.
steps: Assign and correct pools; attempt invalid assignments; confirm transfers and refunds; apply lifecycle corrections; query pool, category, pool-by-category, and unassigned actuals after each operation.
expected: At most one current pool or explicit unassigned state exists per active spend; history remains attributable; transfers contribute zero; refunds offset the original current pool and category in their own period; every grouped total reconciles exactly.
